user.title: Crestron Bridge Configuration
user.description: Configure TCP server for Crestron processor connection

data.port: TCP Port (Crestron will connect to this)

customize.title: Customize Entity Names
customize.description: Customize names for video sources, endpoints, and audio zones (optional)

data_description.video_source_names: Enter 8 source names separated by commas (e.g., Off, Apple TV, Xbox, etc.)
data_description.video_endpoint_names: Enter endpoint names separated by commas (e.g., Living Room TV, Bedroom TV, etc.)
data_description.audio_zone_names: Enter zone names separated by commas (e.g., Living Room, Bedroom, etc.)
